summary: Excellent ultramatrix capture of a magical July‑31 1988 weekend show with a happy, high‑energy band.
review: The ultramatrix recording delivers a clear and lively sound that lets listeners feel the hot, dusty atmosphere of Jerry Garcia’s birthday weekend. Reviewers rave about the consistently great playing and numerous stand‑outs throughout an upbeat set featuring special guests like David Lindley & El Rayo X and Los Lobos.

ai_rating.rationale: A single 5‑star review highlights an outstanding performance and a good‑quality matrix source; the lack of detailed technical commentary keeps confidence at medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Review calls it a "Nice Matrix" – suggests the ultramatrix blend is clear, well‑balanced and captures the live ambience without major issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Consistent run with stand‑outs all over; a magical, fun vibe kept the audience engaged despite heat and dust.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Mentioned as part of a happy band celebrating his birthday weekend.
